data.description: KREMLIN SAYS RUSSIA'S PUTIN DISCUSSES SYRIA WITH TURKEY'S ERDOGAN
BRITAIN'S FTSE 100 UP 0.19%  GERMANY'S DAX DOWN 0.34%  FRANCE'S CAC 40 UP 0.01%  SPAIN'S IBEX DOWN 0.01%
Russia's President Vladimir Putin Talks About Ukraine With Turkey's President Erdogan

Putin and Erdogan discussed the escalation of the situation in Syria over the phone, the Kremlin reported. Putin thanked Erdogan for his willingness to continue facilitating direct Russian-Ukrainian negotiations in Istanbul.

data.title: Baijiayun and Kingsoft Office team up for smart education, leveraging AI expertise. Partenrship announced in Beijing.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Beijing, Baijiayun and Beijing Kingsoft Office Software Co., Ltd. disclosed a strategic collaboration. This alliance aims to maximize the extensive expertise of Baijiayun and Kingsoft Office in AI.

data.title: Shareholder investigation by Halper Sadeh LLC into ONCO, WAT, XAGE for potential violations. - 148 characters
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm focusing on investor rights, has begun investigating several companies for possible breaches related to federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities towards shareholders. One of the companies being scrutinized is Onconetix, Inc. (NASDAQ: ONCO), particularly regarding its merger. The investigation is ongoing, and shareholders are encouraged to stay informed.

data.title: Andrew Peller Ltd. will release Q1 2026 results on August 6, 2025, with a conference call on August 7, 2025 at 10:00 am ET.
data.description: Andrew Peller Limited (ADW.A / ADW.B) based in Grimsby, Ontario, will be releasing its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, on August 6, 2025, post market closure. A conference call is scheduled by management to delve into these financial figures on August 7, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (ET), along with a Q&A session thereafter.

data.title: Labour MP criticizes Nigel Farage's party for accepting crypto donations, calling for ban on political donations in crypto.
data.description: Last month, Nigel Farage's Reform UK party began accepting cryptocurrency donations. Now, a Labour Member of Parliament is advocating for the banning of this practice.
